# Codex Verification Template

## Goal
State what needs to be verified.

## Scope
List the app, route, account, or workflow under test.

## Investigation
- Confirm current branch and latest commit.
- Run the requested checks.
- Capture errors, console output, or screenshots when relevant.

## Fix Rules
- Do not make code changes unless explicitly requested.
- Keep verification evidence tied to acceptance criteria.

## Acceptance Tests
- List each required pass/fail condition.

## Output Required
## Verification Summary
## Evidence
## Tests Run
## Failures Found
## Remaining Risks
